creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Sorry, but did you actually try it?  There are lots of dragons lurking 
in there.  The ordering of variables have to be carefully examined 
for wholescale Makefile inclusions like this (and some of the  
"="s have to be changed to "?=" in lang/expect/Makefile for these 
to take effect too).
